creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
I forced rebuilding and reinstalling libunistring and all ports depending on it (especially the courier ones).

To revert I simply swapped libunistring.

(performed this test three times to be sure)

I do plan to contact unicode developer about this.

I need to test with gcc, I will need to modify the port though, I build everything in poudriere.


I'm not advocating for splitting the port, but I'd like to understand what is going on.

Thanks for your support on this!
